name: LineTypeAttributes
summary: The LineTypeAttributes class contains basic attributes for lines.

constructors.name: LineTypeAttributes()
constructors.summary: Creates a new line type attributes instance.

constructors.name: LineTypeAttributes(LineTypes, DrawingColors)
constructors.summary: Creates a new line type attributes instance with the given line type and color.

params.name: lineType
params.doc: The line type to be used.

throws.when: Throws an exception if the color has an unsupported value. Value must be standard color value.

constructors.name: LineTypeAttributes(LineTypes, TeklaDrawingColor)
constructors.summary: Creates a new line type attributes instance with the given line type and color.

params.name: lineType
params.doc: The line type to be used.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: Color
properties.summary: The color of the line (see DrawingColors for options).

properties.name: TrueColor
properties.summary: The true color (rgb enabled) of the line.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: The type of the line (see LineTypes for options).
